# Synthetic COVID-19 dataset

**Type:** Synthetic, generated by `data/_generate_synthetic.py`.

**License:** [CC BY-NC 4.0](../../LICENSE-CONTENT)

**Purpose:** Pedagogical exemplar for the Chapter 15 case-study notebooks. Generating parameters are documented in `metadata.json` for verification purposes; notebooks treat the data as if unknown and attempt to recover them.

**Seed:** 20260507

**Real data alternatives:** For analysis with actual COVID-19 data, see Our World in Data (https://github.com/owid/covid-19-data) or the JHU CSSE COVID-19 Data Repository.
